name: czrecoil_frame_update_directsound_cmd_ui
description: CZRecoilFrame::OnUpdateDirectSoundCmdUI enables and checks the DirectSound command UI when the DirectSound audio API option is selected.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the czrecoil_frame_audio_api_cmd_ui VC target.
Binary Ninja keeps the branchless SetCheck boolean as a neg/sbb/inc idiom in HLIL; assembly comments identify it as audioApi == 0.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x431aa0 validates Enable(TRUE), zSnd::GetAudioApiOption, and SetCheck(audioApi == 0).
The native smoke selects DirectSound, then verifies OnUpdateDirectSoundCmdUI enables and checks the command UI.
